title: Big Ideas 2026: Stablecoins go mainstream
body: Source: Big Ideas 2026 article
Topic: Stablecoins entering mainstream adoption

title: Agenda
body: 2025 stablecoin transaction volume milestone
Comparison with traditional payment networks
Current stablecoin transaction capabilities
2026 outlook: shift to wealth accumulation platforms

title: 2025 Stablecoin Transaction Volume
body: Stablecoins accounted for an estimated 46 trillion dollars in transaction volume last year
The volume constantly hit new all-time highs throughout the year

title: Comparison with PayPal
body: Stablecoin transaction volume is more than 20x the volume of PayPal
This represents a significant scale advantage over one of the major digital payment platforms

title: Comparison with Visa
body: Stablecoin volume is close to 3x the volume of Visa
Visa is one of the largest payment networks in the world
Stablecoins have approached and surpassed traditional card network scale

title: Comparison with ACH Network
body: Stablecoin volume is rapidly approaching the volume of ACH in the United States
ACH is the electronic network for financial transactions like direct deposits
This indicates stablecoins are reaching the scale of core banking infrastructure

title: Current Stablecoin Transaction Speed
body: Today, you can send a stablecoin in less than a second
This near-instant settlement represents a significant advantage over traditional payment rails

title: Current Stablecoin Transaction Cost
body: Stablecoin transactions cost less than a cent
The sub-cent transaction fees enable microtransactions and high-frequency use cases

title: 2026 Platform Evolution: From Preservation to Accumulation
body: In 2026, platforms will be built for wealth accumulation, not just wealth preservation
This represents a fundamental shift in stablecoin use cases beyond store of value

title: Fintech Players: Revolut
body: Fintechs like Revolut will leverage their tech-stack lead in 2026
Revolut is positioned to build wealth accumulation platforms using stablecoins

title: Fintech Players: Robinhood
body: Fintechs like Robinhood will leverage their tech-stack lead in 2026
Robinhood is positioned to build wealth accumulation platforms using stablecoins

title: Exchange Players: Coinbase
body: Exchanges like Coinbase will leverage their tech-stack lead in 2026
Coinbase is positioned to build wealth accumulation platforms using stablecoins

title: Outlook: Mainstream Adoption in 2026
body: Stablecoins are transitioning from niche crypto infrastructure to mainstream financial tools
The combination of scale, speed, cost, and new wealth accumulation platforms will drive adoption
Leading fintech and exchange platforms have the technology foundation to capitalize on this shift
